narrative:
Precinct Warren Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 758 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
